name: Quickdraw Duel
flavor: High Noon Gambit — Billy the Kid's signature Reaction. You drew faster: the other fella never got his shot off.
reactionTrigger: When an opposing player declares a valid target against one of your Hands.
summary: Before that Attack is rolled, the targeted Hand immediately makes 1 Attack of its own (draw first).

effects.text: The targeted Hand draws first and makes 1 Attack.
